title: Australian Citrus Mellow Lasagna
description: A twist on the classic Italian dish, this Australian Citrus Mellow Lasagna features a zesty citrus chicken filling and a smooth mellow ricotta cheese.

ingredients.name: Freshly squeezed citrus juice (orange, lemon, lime)

instructions: Cook the Australian lasagna noodles according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the citrus juice, shredded chicken, mellow ricotta cheese, salt, and black pepper.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped basil leaves and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
In a large baking dish, spread a layer of the citrus-chicken mixture on the bottom.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the citrus-chicken mixture.
Sprinkle with shredded mozzarella cheese and repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of mozzarella cheese on top.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the lasagna is heated through.
Let the lasagna rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
